questions.text: If $x - \frac{1}{x} = 5$, find the value of $x^3 - \frac{1}{x^3}$.
If $\sec(90^\circ - \theta) = \sqrt{2}$, find the value of $\tan \theta$.
Two similar triangles $\Delta ABC$ and $\Delta PQR$ have perimeters 36 cm and 24 cm respectively. If $PQ = 10$ cm, find the length of $AB$.
A solid metallic sphere of radius 8 cm is melted and recast into small solid spheres of radius 2 cm each. How many such spheres can be made?
Two trains of lengths 150 m and 200 m are moving in opposite directions at 90 km/h and 54 km/h respectively. What is the time taken by them to cross each other?
A grocer claims to sell his goods at a 10% loss but uses a weight of 800 grams instead of 1 kg. Find his overall profit or loss percentage.
P, Q, and R can finish a work in 20, 30, and 60 days respectively. P works daily, and Q and R assist him on every third day. In how many days will the work be completed?
The sales of Car B over three months (Jan, Feb, Mar) are 50, 60, and 70 units respectively. What is the average monthly sales of Car B?
In a company of 500 employees, 40% are females. If 20% of the females and 30% of the males receive a promotion, what percentage of the total employees were promoted?
Using the data from the previous question (500 total employees, 40% females, with 20% of females and 30% of males promoted), what is the ratio of unpromoted females to unpromoted males?
From a point P outside a circle with center O, a tangent PT and a secant PAB are drawn. If $PT = 12$ cm and $PA = 8$ cm, find the length of the chord AB.
A circular lawn of radius 21 m is surrounded by a path 7 m wide. Find the area of the path. (Use $\pi = \frac{22}{7}$)
Which of the following expressions represents the greatest value?
Evaluate the expression: $$\frac{\sin 30^\circ \cos 60^\circ + \cos 30^\circ \sin 60^\circ}{\tan 45^\circ}$$
A vessel contains 60 liters of a mixture of milk and water in the ratio 7:3. How much water (in liters) must be added to make the ratio 1:1?
A sum of money amounts to Rs. 9,680 in 2 years and Rs. 10,648 in 3 years at compound interest, compounded annually. Find the rate of interest per annum.
The average of 12 numbers is 45. The average of the first 5 numbers is 40 and that of the last 6 numbers is 50. Find the 6th number.
The marked price of an air conditioner is Rs. 15,000. Two successive discounts of 20% and 10% are given. Find the final selling price.
Find the slope of the line passing through the points $(2, -3)$ and $(4, 5)$.
If $A : B = 3 : 4$ and $B : C = 5 : 6$, determine the ratio $A : B : C$.
In a cyclic quadrilateral ABCD, if $\angle A = 75^\circ$, what is the measure of $\angle C$?
What is the least number which when divided by 8, 12, and 16 leaves a remainder of 3 in each case?
A person travels from City A to City B at an average speed of 40 km/h and returns from City B to City A at 60 km/h. Find his average speed for the entire round trip.
Arrange the fractions $\frac{3}{4}$, $\frac{4}{5}$, $\frac{5}{6}$, and $\frac{7}{8}$ in descending order.
The perimeter of an equilateral triangle is 36 cm. Find its approximate area. (Use $\sqrt{3} \approx 1.732$)
